q: What is your main programming focus?
a: I specialize in backend architecture and full-stack integration: building REST/GraphQL APIs, custom WooCommerce payment systems, and linking them to modern headless frontends like Astro or Next.js.

q: How can you help scale WooCommerce sites?
a: I optimize slow database queries, integrate robust transaction-safe payment options (UPI, Razorpay, Stripe), offload content to headless CMS setups, and configure solid object caching.

q: Are you available for contract or full-time roles?
a: Yes! I am available for contract consulting, part-time engineering roles, payment integration projects, or headless CMS migrations. Reach out via email: hello@sayandatta.co.in.
